nasb.text: Therefore Jesus also, that He might sanctify the people through His own blood, suffered outside the gate.

esv.text: So Jesus also suffered outside the gate in order to sanctify the people through his own blood.

cnv.text: 所以耶穌也是這樣在城門外受苦，為的是要藉著自己的血使人民成聖。

ccb.text: 同样，耶稣也在城门外受难，为要用自己的血使祂的子民圣洁。

csbs.text: 所以耶稣为了藉着自己的血使子民分别为圣，也在城门外受难。
